EnableDebugLogging.title: Enable Debug Logging
EnableDebugLogging.description: Emit verbose diagnostic lines to the MelonLoader console. Useful for troubleshooting.

ModToastDurationSeconds.title: Mod Message Duration (seconds)
ModToastDurationSeconds.description: How long mod messages stay visible in the bottom-left corner before fading. Vanilla join/leave connect messages are unchanged (~2 seconds). Each player controls this locally.

EnableExtendedSaveSlots.title: Enable Extended Save Slots
EnableExtendedSaveSlots.description: When enabled, replaces the separate New/Load Tram menus with a unified save picker (up to 99 manual slots). When disabled, vanilla New/Load Tram behavior is used.

EnableExtendedSpectatorPlayerList.title: Enable Extended Spectator Player List
EnableExtendedSpectatorPlayerList.description: Replace the 4-player spectator death list with a two-column layout that scales to screen height. Living players are shown first, then dead; each group is sorted alphabetically.

EnableDungeonRandomizer.title: Enable Dungeon Randomizer
EnableDungeonRandomizer.description: Randomize dungeon selection: tram dungeon pick, layout flow, map variant, and procedural seed. Host only.

RandomizeDungeonPick.title: Randomize Dungeon Pick
RandomizeDungeonPick.description: Override which dungeon master ID is rolled on the tram.

DungeonPickPoolMode.title: Dungeon Pick Pool Mode
DungeonPickPoolMode.description: WidenVanilla = keep cycle weights but allow repeats sooner; AllActiveUniform = pick uniformly from all active dungeons (ignores cycle table).

DungeonAllowlist.title: Dungeon Allowlist
DungeonAllowlist.description: Comma-separated dungeon master IDs. When non-empty, only these IDs are eligible.

DungeonBlocklist.title: Dungeon Blocklist
DungeonBlocklist.description: Comma-separated dungeon master IDs to exclude from the pool.

IgnoreDungeonExcludeList.title: Ignore Dungeon Exclude List
IgnoreDungeonExcludeList.description: When using WidenVanilla, do not exclude recently played dungeons from the tram roll.

RandomizeLayoutFlow.title: Randomize Layout Flow
RandomizeLayoutFlow.description: Pick DunGen layout flows uniformly from each dungeon's candidates instead of using weighted vanilla rolls.

RandomizeMapVariant.title: Randomize Map Variant
RandomizeMapVariant.description: Pick map variants uniformly from each dungeon's MapIDs instead of vanilla selection.

RandomizeDungeonSeed.title: Randomize Dungeon Seed
RandomizeDungeonSeed.description: Replace the procedural dungeon seed with a new random value when a dungeon is chosen.

EnableDungeonTime.title: Enable Dungeon Time
EnableDungeonTime.description: Extend dungeon shift length when player count exceeds the baseline. Host only.

DungeonTimeBaselinePlayerCount.title: Baseline Player Count
DungeonTimeBaselinePlayerCount.description: No extra shift time at or below this player count (vanilla is 4). Minimum is 1.

ExtraShiftSecondsPerPlayerAboveBaseline.title: Extra Shift Time per Player (seconds)
ExtraShiftSecondsPerPlayerAboveBaseline.description: Real seconds added to the shift deadline for each player above the baseline. Minimum is 0.

EnableWeather.title: Enable Weather
EnableWeather.description: Control dungeon weather, cyclic presets, and synced start time. Host only.

WeatherMode.title: Weather Mode
WeatherMode.description: Vanilla = game schedule; Fixed = one preset for the run; Cycle = rotate presets on a timer. Host only.

FixedWeatherPreset.title: Fixed Weather Preset
FixedWeatherPreset.description: Used when Weather Mode is Fixed.

DisableRandomWeather.title: Disable Random Weather
DisableRandomWeather.description: Vanilla mode only — remove procedural random weather while keeping scheduled changes. Host only.

WeatherCyclePresets.title: Weather Cycle Presets
WeatherCyclePresets.description: Cycle mode only — comma-separated preset names in order (Sunny, Rain, HeavyRain, Squall). Host only.

WeatherCycleMinDelaySeconds.title: Cycle Min Delay (seconds)
WeatherCycleMinDelaySeconds.description: Minimum real seconds before the next cycle step. Host only.

WeatherCycleMaxDelaySeconds.title: Cycle Max Delay (seconds)
WeatherCycleMaxDelaySeconds.description: Maximum real seconds before the next cycle step. Host only.

StartTimePreset.title: Start Time Preset
StartTimePreset.description: Synced in-game clock at dungeon start (lighting only; real shift deadline unchanged). Sunrise ~06:00, sunset ~18:00. Vanilla uses dungeon data (~10:00).

EnableRealtimeTramClock.title: Realtime Tram Clock
EnableRealtimeTramClock.description: Requires Enable Weather. During a dungeon run, update the tram console clock every in-game minute instead of only on hour changes (~once per real minute at default time scale). Host only; uses vanilla network sync.

EnableJoinAnytime.title: Enable Join Anytime
EnableJoinAnytime.description: Allow players to join a session after it has already started.

JoinConnectionGraceSeconds.title: Join Connection Grace (seconds)
JoinConnectionGraceSeconds.description: When a player connects, block tram departure for this many seconds while they finish loading. Players who do not become ready in time are kicked (host is never kicked).

EnableLootMultiplicator.title: Enable Loot Multiplicator
EnableLootMultiplicator.description: Scale map loot and enemy death drops, and optionally convert mimic fake drops to real loot. Host only.

LootMultiplicatorPlayerCountScaleRate.title: Loot Player Count Scale Rate
LootMultiplicatorPlayerCountScaleRate.description: Extra multiplier per player above 4 when an Auto Scale … by Player Count toggle is enabled (0.10 = +10% per extra player, stacks with loot multipliers). Minimum is 0.

AutoScaleMapLootByPlayerCount.title: Auto Scale Map Loot by Player Count
AutoScaleMapLootByPlayerCount.description: Map loot is items placed on the dungeon map (spawn markers, shelves, floors). When enabled, apply Loot Player Count Scale Rate per player above 4 (stacks with Map Loot Multiplier).

MapLootMultiplier.title: Map Loot Multiplier
MapLootMultiplier.description: Multiplier for map-placed pickup loot: (1) fixed markers — extra copies, consumable stack size, and respawn count; (2) random pool markers — spawn count via the dungeon scrap-value budget; (3) not applied to trigger/event spawns. 1 = vanilla, 2 = double. With allowlist/blocklist, Auto Scale Map Loot Budget for Filter (default on) adjusts the random-pool budget for item sell value so this multiplier still targets spawn count.

AutoScaleDropLootByPlayerCount.title: Auto Scale Drop Loot by Player Count
AutoScaleDropLootByPlayerCount.description: Drop loot is items from enemy death tables when killed. When enabled, apply Loot Player Count Scale Rate per player above 4 (stacks with Drop Loot Multiplier).

DropLootMultiplier.title: Drop Loot Multiplier
DropLootMultiplier.description: Multiplier for enemy death drops: extra weighted re-rolls from drop tables and consumable stack count on spawn. 1 = vanilla, 2 = double.

LootItemFilterMode.title: Loot Item Filter Mode
LootItemFilterMode.description: All = every item can spawn; AllowlistOnly = only comma-separated master IDs in Loot Allowlist; BlocklistOnly = all items except Loot Blocklist. Filtering changes which items random pool markers can roll. Expensive allowlists consume more of the dungeon scrap-value budget per spawn unless Auto Scale Map Loot Budget for Filter is enabled.

LootAllowlist.title: Loot Allowlist
LootAllowlist.description: Comma-separated item master IDs (e.g. 12345,67890). Used when Loot Item Filter Mode is AllowlistOnly. IDs not in the dungeon table are injected into random pool markers. High-value items use more scrap budget per spawn. See docs/LOOT_ITEM_IDS.md in the repo for the full list.

LootBlocklist.title: Loot Blocklist
LootBlocklist.description: Comma-separated item master IDs to exclude from spawning. Used when Loot Item Filter Mode is BlocklistOnly. See docs/LOOT_ITEM_IDS.md in the repo for the full list.

AutoScaleMapLootBudgetForFilter.title: Auto Scale Map Loot Budget for Filter
AutoScaleMapLootBudgetForFilter.description: When Loot Item Filter Mode is AllowlistOnly or BlocklistOnly, multiply the random-pool scrap budget by the filtered/vanilla weighted mean item sell value (on top of Map Loot Multiplier) so Map Loot Multiplier still means more spawns, not just higher total scrap value. No effect when filter mode is All.

ConvertFakeActorDyingDropChancePercent.title: Fake Death Drop Chance (percent)
ConvertFakeActorDyingDropChancePercent.description: Chance (0–100) that fake items dropped on enemy death (e.g. mimic inventory decoys) become real pickup loot. 0 = vanilla (fake items vanish on grab), 100 = always real. Monster drop-table loot is already real.

EnableMimicTuning.title: Enable Mimic Tuning
EnableMimicTuning.description: Host-only mimic voice frequency and inventory-copy tuning. Subfeatures use Vanilla or Custom modes.

MimicVoiceTuningMode.title: Mimic Voice Tuning Mode
MimicVoiceTuningMode.description: Vanilla keeps game voice timing. Custom applies response chance, cooldown, delay, distance, and interval keys.

PeriodicVoiceIntervalMultiplier.title: Periodic Voice Interval Multiplier
PeriodicVoiceIntervalMultiplier.description: Custom only: scales ambient mimic voice cooldown between lines (1 = vanilla, 0.5 = about twice as chatty).

PlayerVoiceResponseChancePercent.title: Player Voice Response Chance (%)
PlayerVoiceResponseChancePercent.description: Custom only: chance a nearby mimic replays an archived line after a player speaks (0–100).

PlayerVoiceResponseCooldownSeconds.title: Player Voice Response Cooldown (seconds)
PlayerVoiceResponseCooldownSeconds.description: Custom only: minimum seconds between mimic reactions to player speech (vanilla is 3).

PlayerVoiceResponseDelayMinSeconds.title: Player Voice Response Delay Min (seconds)
PlayerVoiceResponseDelayMinSeconds.description: Custom only: shortest random pause before a mimic replies to player speech.

PlayerVoiceResponseDelayMaxSeconds.title: Player Voice Response Delay Max (seconds)
PlayerVoiceResponseDelayMaxSeconds.description: Custom only: longest random pause before a mimic replies. Must be ≥ min.

PlayerVoiceResponseMaxDistance.title: Player Voice Response Max Distance (m)
PlayerVoiceResponseMaxDistance.description: Custom only: max range for mimics to react when a player speaks (vanilla is 20).

MimicInventoryCopyMode.title: Mimic Inventory Copy Mode
MimicInventoryCopyMode.description: Vanilla uses behavior-tree pick rules. Custom forces the pick rule below for mimic CopyInventory.

MimicInventoryCopyPickRule.title: Mimic Inventory Copy Pick Rule
MimicInventoryCopyPickRule.description: Custom only: which player inventory mimics copy (MinDistance, MaxDistance, or Random).

EnableMimicPossessionTuning.title: Enable Mimic Possession Tuning
EnableMimicPossessionTuning.description: Tune dead-player mimic possession speak duration and cooldown on the host.

RandomizeMimicPossessionDuration.title: Randomize Mimic Possession Duration
RandomizeMimicPossessionDuration.description: Roll a random speak window per E-possession between min and max seconds below.

MimicPossessionMinTimeSeconds.title: Mimic Possession Min Time (seconds)
MimicPossessionMinTimeSeconds.description: Minimum rolled speak duration in seconds (vanilla is 12).

MimicPossessionMaxTimeSeconds.title: Mimic Possession Max Time (seconds)
MimicPossessionMaxTimeSeconds.description: Maximum rolled speak duration in seconds (vanilla is 12).

MimicPossessionCooltimeMultiplier.title: Mimic Possession Cooltime Multiplier
MimicPossessionCooltimeMultiplier.description: Multiplier for wait time after mimic possession before the next E-possession (1 = vanilla).

EnableEconomy.title: Enable Economy
EnableEconomy.description: Scale startup money, round goal quota, scrap/sell values, shop buy prices, and reinforce costs. Optionally retain unspent currency between maintenance cycles. Host only.

EconomyPlayerCountScaleRate.title: Economy Player Count Scale Rate
EconomyPlayerCountScaleRate.description: Extra multiplier per player above 4 when an Auto Scale … by Player Count toggle is enabled (0.10 = +10% per extra player, stacks with money multipliers). Minimum is 0.

AutoScaleStartupMoneyByPlayerCount.title: Auto Scale Startup Money by Player Count
AutoScaleStartupMoneyByPlayerCount.description: When enabled, apply Economy Player Count Scale Rate per player above 4 (stacks with Startup Money Multiplier).

StartupMoneyMultiplier.title: Startup Money Multiplier
StartupMoneyMultiplier.description: Starting maintenance-room currency on a new save slot or session reset to vanilla initial money (1 = vanilla, 2 = double). Does not apply when loading a save game.

AutoScaleRoundGoalMoneyByPlayerCount.title: Auto Scale Round Goal Money by Player Count
AutoScaleRoundGoalMoneyByPlayerCount.description: When enabled, apply Economy Player Count Scale Rate per player above 4 (stacks with Round Goal Money Multiplier).

RoundGoalMoneyMultiplier.title: Round Goal Money Multiplier
RoundGoalMoneyMultiplier.description: Target currency required to finish a stage (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

AutoScaleScrapSellValueByPlayerCount.title: Auto Scale Scrap Sell Value by Player Count
AutoScaleScrapSellValueByPlayerCount.description: When enabled, apply Economy Player Count Scale Rate per player above 4 (stacks with Scrap Sell Value Multiplier).

ScrapSellValueMultiplier.title: Scrap Sell Value Multiplier
ScrapSellValueMultiplier.description: Currency earned when scrapping items and item value counted toward the tram quota (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

AutoScaleShopBuyPriceByPlayerCount.title: Auto Scale Shop Buy Price by Player Count
AutoScaleShopBuyPriceByPlayerCount.description: When enabled, apply Economy Player Count Scale Rate per player above 4 (stacks with Shop Buy Price Multiplier).

ShopBuyPriceMultiplier.title: Shop Buy Price Multiplier
ShopBuyPriceMultiplier.description: Maintenance shop and vending-machine kiosk purchase cost multiplier (1 = vanilla, 2 = double). Applied when shop items are initialized each maintenance round.

ShopDiscountMinPercent.title: Shop Discount Min (percent)
ShopDiscountMinPercent.description: Minimum shop discount percentage when a discount is rolled (0–100). Only used when Shop Discount Chance (percent) is above 0.

ShopDiscountMaxPercent.title: Shop Discount Max (percent)
ShopDiscountMaxPercent.description: Maximum shop discount percentage when a discount is rolled (0–100). Must be ≥ Shop Discount Min (percent).

ShopDiscountChancePercent.title: Shop Discount Chance (percent)
ShopDiscountChancePercent.description: Chance per shop item to receive a discount between min and max percent (0 = vanilla shop discounts, 100 = every item discounted).

AutoScaleReinforcePriceByPlayerCount.title: Auto Scale Reinforce Price by Player Count
AutoScaleReinforcePriceByPlayerCount.description: When enabled, apply Economy Player Count Scale Rate per player above 4 (stacks with Reinforce Price Multiplier).

ReinforcePriceMultiplier.title: Reinforce Price Multiplier
ReinforcePriceMultiplier.description: Maintenance item reinforcement cost multiplier (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

RetainUnspentCurrencyBetweenCycles.title: Retain Unspent Currency Between Cycles
RetainUnspentCurrencyBetweenCycles.description: Keep unspent maintenance-room currency when departing for the next dungeon instead of zeroing it. Does not affect tram repair cost. Host only.

EnableMorePlayers.title: Enable More Players
EnableMorePlayers.description: Raise the multiplayer player cap above 4.

MaxPlayers.title: Max Players
MaxPlayers.description: Maximum players in a session including the host (1 = solo, 2 = host + 1 client, etc.).

MaxIndoorVoiceEvents.title: Max Indoor Voice Events
MaxIndoorVoiceEvents.description: Maximum stored voice events per player in indoor dungeon runs (default game limit is much lower).

MaxDeathMatchVoiceEvents.title: Max Deathmatch Voice Events
MaxDeathMatchVoiceEvents.description: Maximum stored voice events per player in deathmatch (default game limit is much lower).

MaxOutdoorVoiceEvents.title: Max Outdoor Voice Events
MaxOutdoorVoiceEvents.description: Maximum stored voice events per player outdoors (default game limit is much lower).

EnablePersistence.title: Enable Voice Persistence
EnablePersistence.description: Save and restore mimic voice recordings across save/load.

ShowPlayerAnnouncements.title: Show Player Messages
ShowPlayerAnnouncements.description: Show player messages in the bottom-left corner for dungeon run settings, boss spawns, and your per-map stats when you die. Does not replace the game's own messages.

EnablePlayerTuning.title: Enable Player Tuning
EnablePlayerTuning.description: Scale player move speed, stamina, and carry weight. Joining clients do not need the mod. Host only.

MoveSpeedMultiplier.title: Move Speed Multiplier
MoveSpeedMultiplier.description: Scales walk and run base speed (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

NoClipSpeedMultiplier.title: Noclip Speed Multiplier
NoClipSpeedMultiplier.description: Scales dashboard noclip fly speed relative to the player's current walk/run speed (3 = triple). Only applies while noclip is active.

StaminaDrainMultiplier.title: Stamina Drain Multiplier
StaminaDrainMultiplier.description: Scales sprint stamina cost per tick (1 = vanilla, 0.5 = half drain).

StaminaRegenMultiplier.title: Stamina Regen Multiplier
StaminaRegenMultiplier.description: Scales stamina recovered per regen tick (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

StaminaRegenDelayMultiplier.title: Stamina Regen Delay Multiplier
StaminaRegenDelayMultiplier.description: Scales wait time before stamina regen starts after sprinting (1 = vanilla, 0.5 = regen starts sooner).

MaxCarryWeightMultiplier.title: Max Carry Weight Multiplier
MaxCarryWeightMultiplier.description: Scales carry capacity before encumbrance slows movement (1 = vanilla, 2 = double capacity).

DisablePlayerCollision.title: Disable Player Collision
DisablePlayerCollision.description: On the host client, disable capsule colliders on other players so you can walk through them (e.g. crowded tram). Local effect only; requires Enable Player Tuning.

EnableSpawnScaling.title: Enable Spawn Scaling
EnableSpawnScaling.description: Scale dungeon monster and trap spawn budgets by type. Host only.

SpawnScalingPlayerCountScaleRate.title: Spawn Player Count Scale Rate
SpawnScalingPlayerCountScaleRate.description: Extra multiplier per player above 4 when an Auto Scale … by Player Count toggle is enabled (0.10 = +10% per extra player, stacks with per-type multipliers). Minimum is 0.

AutoScaleMimicSpawnsByPlayerCount.title: Auto Scale Mimic Spawns by Player Count
AutoScaleMimicSpawnsByPlayerCount.description: When enabled, apply Spawn Player Count Scale Rate per player above 4 (stacks with Mimic Spawn Multiplier).

MimicSpawnMultiplier.title: Mimic Spawn Multiplier
MimicSpawnMultiplier.description: Total mimic spawn budget across the run, including periodic spawns (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

AutoScaleBossSpawnsByPlayerCount.title: Auto Scale Boss Spawns by Player Count
AutoScaleBossSpawnsByPlayerCount.description: When enabled, apply Spawn Player Count Scale Rate per player above 4 (stacks with Boss Spawn Multiplier).

BossSpawnMultiplier.title: Boss Spawn Multiplier
BossSpawnMultiplier.description: Map-placed bosses: activates unused alternate markers and schedules bonus encounters after kill (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

AutoScaleJakoSpawnsByPlayerCount.title: Auto Scale Jako Spawns by Player Count
AutoScaleJakoSpawnsByPlayerCount.description: When enabled, apply Spawn Player Count Scale Rate per player above 4 (stacks with Jako Spawn Multiplier).

JakoSpawnMultiplier.title: Jako Spawn Multiplier
JakoSpawnMultiplier.description: Total normal-monster threat budget for ambient dungeon spawns (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

AutoScaleSpecialSpawnsByPlayerCount.title: Auto Scale Special Spawns by Player Count
AutoScaleSpecialSpawnsByPlayerCount.description: When enabled, apply Spawn Player Count Scale Rate per player above 4 (stacks with Special Spawn Multiplier).

SpecialSpawnMultiplier.title: Special Spawn Multiplier
SpecialSpawnMultiplier.description: Special monster budget for periodic spawns and map-placed specials (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

AutoScaleTrapSpawnsByPlayerCount.title: Auto Scale Trap Spawns by Player Count
AutoScaleTrapSpawnsByPlayerCount.description: When enabled, apply Spawn Player Count Scale Rate per player above 4 (stacks with Trap Spawn Multiplier).

TrapSpawnMultiplier.title: Trap Spawn Multiplier
TrapSpawnMultiplier.description: Map-placed traps: activates unused alternate markers and schedules bonus encounters after trigger/kill (1 = vanilla, 2 = double).

PeriodicSpawnWaitMode.title: Periodic Spawn Wait Mode
PeriodicSpawnWaitMode.description: Controls initial delay before the first ambient jako/mimic wave and the interval between waves. Vanilla uses dungeon data; Fixed and Random use the second-based keys below. Spawn multipliers no longer shorten wave intervals.

InitialPeriodicSpawnWaitSeconds.title: Initial Periodic Spawn Wait (seconds)
InitialPeriodicSpawnWaitSeconds.description: Fixed mode: seconds after dungeon start before the first ambient jako/mimic spawn wave can fire.

InitialPeriodicSpawnWaitMinSeconds.title: Initial Periodic Spawn Wait Min (seconds)
InitialPeriodicSpawnWaitMinSeconds.description: Random mode: shortest initial wait before the first ambient spawn wave.

InitialPeriodicSpawnWaitMaxSeconds.title: Initial Periodic Spawn Wait Max (seconds)
InitialPeriodicSpawnWaitMaxSeconds.description: Random mode: longest initial wait. Actual wait is picked between min and max.

PeriodicSpawnIntervalSeconds.title: Periodic Spawn Interval (seconds)
PeriodicSpawnIntervalSeconds.description: Fixed mode: seconds between subsequent ambient jako/mimic spawn waves.

PeriodicSpawnIntervalMinSeconds.title: Periodic Spawn Interval Min (seconds)
PeriodicSpawnIntervalMinSeconds.description: Random mode: shortest interval between ambient spawn waves.

PeriodicSpawnIntervalMaxSeconds.title: Periodic Spawn Interval Max (seconds)
PeriodicSpawnIntervalMaxSeconds.description: Random mode: longest interval between waves. Actual interval is picked between min and max after each wave.

MapPlacedEncounterDelayMinSeconds.title: Map-Placed Encounter Delay Min (seconds)
MapPlacedEncounterDelayMinSeconds.description: Shortest wait after a map-placed enemy, trap, or loot marker is cleared before the next bonus encounter from scaling can appear there.

MapPlacedEncounterDelayMaxSeconds.title: Map-Placed Encounter Delay Max (seconds)
MapPlacedEncounterDelayMaxSeconds.description: Longest wait for that random delay. Actual delay is picked between min and max.

MapPlacedEncounterMinPlayerDistanceMeter.title: Map-Placed Encounter Min Player Distance (m)
MapPlacedEncounterMinPlayerDistanceMeter.description: After the delay, hold the spawn until no living players are within this radius of the marker. 0 = spawn as soon as the delay elapses.

AutoScaleOtherSpawnsByPlayerCount.title: Auto Scale Other Spawns by Player Count
AutoScaleOtherSpawnsByPlayerCount.description: When enabled, apply Spawn Player Count Scale Rate per player above 4 (stacks with Other Spawn Multiplier).

OtherSpawnMultiplier.title: Other Spawn Multiplier
OtherSpawnMultiplier.description: Spawn multiplier for entities that are not mimics, bosses, jakos, specials, or traps.

EnableStatistics.title: Enable Player Statistics
EnableStatistics.description: Track per-session and global player statistics per save slot.

SessionReconnectGraceMinutes.title: Session Reconnect Grace (minutes)
SessionReconnectGraceMinutes.description: Reuse the previous session when a player reconnects within this many minutes.

ShowStatisticsToasts.title: Show Statistics Messages
ShowStatisticsToasts.description: Show statistics messages in the bottom-left corner (session intro for you, global stats on join/leave). Does not replace the game's own connect messages.

EnableWebDashboard.title: Enable Web Dashboard
EnableWebDashboard.description: Serve a local web UI for connected players and host moderation. Default bind is loopback only.

WebDashboardListenAddress.title: Listen Address
WebDashboardListenAddress.description: HTTP bind address. Use 127.0.0.1 for local-only access.

WebDashboardListenPort.title: Listen Port
WebDashboardListenPort.description: TCP port for the local web dashboard.

stats.session_started: A new stats session has been started.

announce.map_run_empty: Your run this map: no recorded activity yet.

joinanytime.blocked_dungeon: Can't depart yet — other players are still in the dungeon.
joinanytime.blocked_split: Can't depart yet — other players are still outside the tram.
joinanytime.blocked_connecting: Can't depart yet — a player is still connecting.

saveslots.funny_tram_10: Mind the gap between the saves
saveslots.funny_tram_28: Leaving the station of good ideas

api.web_dashboard_readonly: Web dashboard settings cannot be changed from the web UI. Edit the config file instead.
api.web_dashboard_no_save_override: Web dashboard settings cannot be overridden per save slot.
api.saved_save: Applied — use in-game save to persist to disk.
api.save_override_not_allowed: This setting cannot be overridden per save slot.
api.player_banned_offline: Player banned (disconnect may have failed if already offline).
api.revive_not_allowed: Revive not allowed in the current room state.
api.player_dead_use_respawn: Player is dead. Use respawn instead.
api.cannot_moderate_host: Cannot moderate the local host player.
api.host_cheats_require_alive: Host cheats require an alive host player.
api.player_cheats_require_alive: Player cheats require an alive in-game player.
api.timed_out: Timed out waiting for the game thread.
api.item_spawned_world: Inventory full — item spawned in front of player.
api.player_delete_not_found: No stored player data found for this Steam ID.
api.player_delete_connected: Cannot delete player data while they are connected.
api.cannot_delete_host: Cannot delete the local host player.
api.quick_preset_builtin_readonly: Built-in quick presets cannot be modified.
api.quick_preset_exists: A user preset with this ID already exists.
api.quick_profile_preset_applied: Quick preset applied to this save.

loot_picnic.name: Loot Picnic
loot_picnic.description: High loot, low spawns — explore and hoard without much danger.

as_intended.name: As Intended™
as_intended.description: Vanilla gameplay with More Players and Join Anytime enabled.

full_house.name: Full House
full_house.description: Most features on with +10% scaling per player above 4.

abandon_hope.name: Abandon All Hope
abandon_hope.description: Brutal spawns, higher money targets, and heavy player-count scaling.

dashboard.nav_lobby_disabled_hint: Join a lobby to access this page
dashboard.nav_host_only_hint: Host only — not available as a guest
dashboard.home_lead: A maintained mod for MIMESIS that consolidates community tweaks and adds original features: larger lobbies, mimic voice persistence, join-anytime, spawn/loot/economy scaling, dungeon randomization, weather control, session statistics, and this web dashboard — all configurable from one place. Only the host needs the mod installed.
dashboard.home_status_hint: Host or join a game in Mimesis first. This dashboard connects automatically once you enter a lobby.
dashboard.home_section_web_lead: In-lobby tools in your browser while the game is running.
dashboard.home_section_mod_lead: Gameplay enhancements applied by the host. Guests can join without installing the mod.
dashboard.home_web_players_desc: See who is connected, view vitals and session stats, and use host moderation tools such as kick, ban, heal, respawn, and item spawn.
dashboard.home_web_minimap_desc: Follow player positions on a live dungeon map during runs. Guests can use blind mode to hide spoilers.
dashboard.home_web_stats_desc: Browse per-save leaderboards and open detailed player statistics across sessions.
dashboard.home_web_settings_desc: Edit global defaults and per-save overrides, switch quick presets, and tune every feature without hand-editing the config file.
dashboard.home_mod_more_players_desc: Raise the vanilla four-player session cap so larger groups can play together.
dashboard.home_mod_more_voices_desc: Let mimics store many more recorded player voice lines per run.
dashboard.home_mod_persistence_desc: Keep mimic voice recordings when you save and load a game.
dashboard.home_mod_join_anytime_desc: Allow friends to join after a session has already started.
dashboard.home_mod_ui_desc: Extended save picker, scalable spectator list, and configurable mod toast duration.
dashboard.home_mod_statistics_desc: Track deaths, kills, play time, mimic encounters, and more per save game.
dashboard.home_mod_announcements_desc: On-screen tips for dungeon settings, boss spawns, and personal death stats.
dashboard.home_mod_spawn_scaling_desc: Scale monster and trap spawn budgets by type or player count.
dashboard.home_mod_loot_desc: Adjust how much loot appears on the map and drops from enemies.
dashboard.home_mod_economy_desc: Tune starting cash, quotas, scrap value, shop prices, and optional currency retention.
dashboard.home_mod_dungeon_time_desc: Extend shift deadlines when more players are in the session.
dashboard.home_mod_mimic_tuning_desc: Adjust mimic voice frequency, inventory-copy bias, and possession timing.
dashboard.home_mod_player_tuning_desc: Change movement speed, stamina, and carry weight.
dashboard.home_mod_dungeon_randomizer_desc: Randomize which dungeons appear and how they are laid out.
dashboard.home_mod_weather_desc: Fixed, cycling, or vanilla weather plus synced start time for lighting.
dashboard.blind_mode_title: Hide alive/dead status, health, toxic, and respawn actions to avoid spoilers. Temporarily disabled while you are dead so you can review others' stats.
dashboard.noclip_title: Toggle free movement for this player.
dashboard.donation_lead: Please support my work with a small donation if you can. Maintaining this mod takes a lot of dedicated time.
dashboard.donation_body1: Mimesis Player Enhancement is not a quick patch — it merges several community mods into one maintained package and adds original work on top: Harmony patches across the game, this web dashboard, session statistics, spawn/loot/money scaling, dungeon tweaks, and ongoing compatibility testing with new MIMESIS releases.
dashboard.donation_body2: If you enjoy playing with it and want to say thanks, a small donation is genuinely appreciated but never required.
dashboard.donation_footnote: The mod stays free and open source either way.
dashboard.donation_ai_note: Disclosure: this project is built with the help of AI tools, which also incur ongoing costs on top of the time I put into maintenance, testing, and new features.
dashboard.waiting_api_error: Cannot reach the dashboard API. Make sure the game is running with the mod loaded.
dashboard.waiting_connect_hint: Host or join a game in Mimesis first. This dashboard will connect automatically once you are in a game.
dashboard.leaderboard_host_only: Leaderboard is only available to the host.
dashboard.leaderboard_no_data: No leaderboard data for this save slot yet.
dashboard.minimap_layout_hint: Dungeon layout is still generating or unavailable. Player markers will appear once positions are known.
dashboard.minimap_no_map_tram: Focused player is in the tram — no map available.
dashboard.minimap_no_map: No map available for this scene.
dashboard.settings_profile_intro: Pick a quick preset for this save slot, use your global defaults, or customize every value.
dashboard.settings_profile_global_desc: Follow global defaults from Global Settings with no per-save overrides.
dashboard.quick_customize_banner: Using preset: {label} — editing any value switches this save to custom settings.
dashboard.quick_preset_builtin_readonly: Built-in presets cannot be changed or deleted.
dashboard.quick_share_placeholder: Paste an MPE1:… share string here
dashboard.settings_search_by_placeholder: Search by name, key, or value…
dashboard.settings_intro_global: Edit global mod defaults. These apply everywhere unless overridden for the active save slot.
dashboard.settings_intro_profile: Choose how this save slot applies mod settings. Select a preset, use global defaults, or customize every option individually.
dashboard.settings_intro_save: Edit settings for save slot {slot}. Values matching global defaults are not stored in the save override file.
dashboard.settings_save_persist_hint: Changes apply immediately; use the in-game save button to write them to disk.
dashboard.settings_loot_filter_budget_hint_on: Random pool markers use a dungeon-wide scrap-value budget (not a spawn count). With a filter active, Auto Scale Map Loot Budget for Filter inflates that budget when your allowed items are worth more, so Map Loot Multiplier still increases how many items spawn.
dashboard.settings_loot_filter_budget_hint_off: Random pool markers use a dungeon-wide scrap-value budget. With a filter active and auto budget scaling off, high-value allowlists spawn fewer items unless you raise Map Loot Multiplier further.
dashboard.settings_host_only: Settings are only available to the host.
dashboard.confirm_delete_player: Permanently delete all stored data for {name} ({steamId})? This removes statistics, voice recordings, and display names.
dashboard.settings_feature_disabled_hint: Enable this feature to edit these settings
dashboard.settings_local_hint: This setting only affects your local game client.
dashboard.settings_host_only_hint: Only the host can change this setting.
dashboard.settings_guest_readonly: You are connected as a guest. Host-only settings are shown for reference but cannot be changed.
dashboard.quick_export_help: Creates a share string from the settings currently applied to this save slot. Copy it to back up your preset or share it with other hosts.
dashboard.quick_import_help: Paste a share string from another save slot or host. The preset is saved to your user preset list and can be applied from the cards above.
dashboard.donation_intro: Support continued development of this mod.
